description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by six matching chairs, all featuring a light beige finish. The table has a simple, modern design with clean lines and a flat, smooth tabletop supported by four sturdy legs. Each chair has a slatted backrest and a flat seat, echoing the table's minimalist aesthetic. The set is arranged with two chairs on each of the longer sides and one chair at each end, making it suitable for group gatherings or family meals. The construction appears solid, with no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on functionality and comfort. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for communal use in dining or meeting spaces.
description: A rectangular light beige wooden table with six matching slatted-back chairs, designed for group dining or meetings. The set is simple, modern, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with two chairs in the foreground and four chairs in the background, highlighting the slatted backs and overall symmetry.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the table's length with three chairs visible on each side, emphasizing the rectangular shape and chair arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with two chairs in the foreground and four in the background, showing the back design of the chairs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the table's length and the arrangement of three chairs on each side.
